_comment: MCP server registration template for the Edge DevTools loop. Merge this 'mcpServers' block into your Claude Code settings via tools/edge-mcp/install-mcp.sh. The 'launch-mcp.sh' wrapper resolves the right CDP endpoint at start time (Windows host IP from default route, with 127.0.0.1 + [::1] fallbacks for mirrored-networking setups). Requires that 'tools/edge-mcp/edge-debug-launch.sh' has been run first so port 9222 is reachable, and that 'tools/edge-mcp/windows/setup-elevated.sh' has been run once to register the v4tov6 portproxy + firewall allow rule.

env.PLAYWRIGHT_MCP_DESCRIPTION: Drives Microsoft Edge over the Chrome DevTools Protocol (port 9222) launched via tools/edge-mcp/edge-debug-launch.sh. Provides navigate, screenshot, accessibility tree, click, fill, and evaluate. browser_run_code_unsafe is filtered by default.
